task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded into the workbook.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data panel on the left side of the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface should display 'Sample Order Lines' and its associated columns.

task_completion.description: Verify that a canvas named 'Revenue Overview' exists.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A canvas tab at the bottom or top of the workspace should be explicitly named 'Revenue Overview'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Revenue Overview' canvas contains a Stacked Bar Chart of Revenue (Sales) by Product Category, colored by Customer Segment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A stacked bar chart is visible on the 'Revenue Overview' canvas. The grammar/properties panel or chart axes should show 'Sales' (or 'Revenue'), 'Product Category', and 'Customer Segment' (in the Color section).

task_completion.description: Verify that a second canvas named 'Shipping Performance' exists.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second canvas tab in the workspace should be explicitly named 'Shipping Performance'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Shipping Performance' canvas contains a table with Ship Mode, Order ID (Count), and Discount (Average).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table visualization is visible on the 'Shipping Performance' canvas. The columns/rows must include 'Ship Mode', a count metric for 'Order ID', and an average metric for 'Discount'.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved as 'Operational_Report' in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application title bar should display 'Operational_Report', or a 'Save As' dialog should be visible showing the file being saved as 'Operational_Report' in the 'Documents' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to create the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface being actively used (mouse clicks, drag-and-drop, menu navigation), not just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the charts and tables are genuine Oracle Analytics visualizations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visualizations should appear within the Oracle Analytics canvas workspace with the standard UI elements (grammar panel, properties pane), not as static images opened in a viewer or web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply write a script or edit a raw .dva file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent manually writing JSON/XML code in a text editor to spoof the .dva file structure.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Note: The dataset contains a 'Sales' column instead of 'Revenue'. The agent must use 'Sales' to fulfill the 'Revenue' requirement; do not penalize for using 'Sales'. Expected filename is 'Operational_Report.dva'. Canvas 1 must be named 'Revenue Overview' with a stacked bar chart. Canvas 2 must be named 'Shipping Performance' with a table visualization.
